plugins.name: prompt
plugins.description: Four skills (draft, guides, review, revise) for prompt-engineering against curated Anthropic, OpenAI, and Google guides.

plugins.name: task
plugins.description: Plan a coding task end-to-end: the `draft-spec` skill produces ./.specs/<slug>.md against a fixed 5-section template, and `plan-council` deliberates the implementation plan with Codex before handing off via ExitPlanMode.

plugins.name: repo
plugins.description: Repo-management tools. Ships the `audit` skill (/repo:audit) which assesses agentic readiness via static checks plus five benchmark subagents and renders a navigable HTML scorecard.

plugins.name: code
plugins.description: Tools for assessing and improving source code. Ships the `audit` skill.

plugins.name: docs
plugins.description: Generate and maintain Claude Code onboarding docs (CLAUDE.md + docs/ai/*) for a target codebase via the `generate` skill (/docs:generate).
